findings.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.0 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.0 (examples/secure_bank.sol#2)

Low level call in SecureBank.emergencyWithdraw(address,uint256) (examples/secure_bank.sol#140-154):
	- (success,None) = recipient.call{value: amount}() (examples/secure_bank.sol#150)

Low level call in SecureBank.withdraw() (examples/secure_bank.sol#84-98):
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: balance}() (examples/secure_bank.sol#94)

Low level call in SecureBank.withdrawAmount(uint256) (examples/secure_bank.sol#105-118):
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (examples/secure_bank.sol#114)
